NWS STORM SURVEY RESULTS...TORNADO FROM 2.5 MILES NORTH OF WASHINGTON...MOVING EAST NORTHEAST AND MOVED FROM TAZEWELL COUNTY INTO WOODFORD COUNTY. END OF THE TRACK WAS 2 MILES SOUTH SOUTHEAST OF METAMORA. TOTAL PATH LENGTH WAS 3.5 MILES WITH A WIDTH OF 250 YARDS...RATED EF2 WITH ESTIMATED WINDS OF 120-130 MPH. END TIME AT 858 PM. NWS/TAZEWELL COUNTY EMA SURVEYED EAST PEORIA... GERMANTOWN HILLS ...HOPEDALE AND FOUND NO DAMAGE. THEREFORE THOSE TORNADO TOUCHDOWNS ARE NOT CONFIRMED AND ARE DELETED.
